title: Igaram Protects Vivi
description: On pages 16–19, igaram protects vivi as baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase.
scene: Igaram Protects Vivi. Baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I feel embarrassed at myself for having to fight these losers...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Cutting a hole to escape below...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: the terror of my true strength.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: How can I close the gap to go in for the close attack...?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: How dare you harm me to this extent...!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: But you hurt your- self on your own.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Hahaha! I've sealed up one of your arms!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Haha haha! I won't let you escape!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And consider your precious friend's life forfeit!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on igaram protects vivi. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
